character.name:
Isometric pixel art character, 3/4 front-facing pose, 92×92 sprite. A rugged everyman traveler in worn
  ▎ leather jerkin, brown trousers, scuffed boots. Short sword at hip, small buckler on back, rolled bedroll
  ▎ and waterskin strapped across chest. Weathered sun-tanned skin, tied-back hair, determined expression.
  ▎ Practical, unglamorous, lived-in. Palette: leather brown #8B6F47, sandy beige #D4B896, dark earth #3E2F23.
  ▎ Limited 16-color palette, crisp pixels, no anti-aliasing. Dark fantasy MUD aesthetic.
